failed: Failed to load the floor plan.

setup.title: Create the first floor plan
setup.helper: The size is copied from the previous floor; you can change it before creating.

canvas.drawHint: Click room corners. Move near the first point to close the room; at least three points are needed.

panels.unplacedHelper: Select a device, then click the floor plan to place it.
panels.unplacedEmpty: All devices in this home already have a place on the plan.
panels.unplacedFilteredEmpty: No unplaced devices in this room.
panels.drawDescription: Click around the room edge to define its outline. Near the first point, the line will close the room.
panels.selectionDescription: Select a room or device on the floor to inspect or edit it.

infoModal.title: Edit floor plan
infoModal.helper: Changing the plan size affects the space for drawing rooms and placing devices.

device.notFound: This device is no longer available.

events.externalUpdateWhileEditing: The floor changed elsewhere. Reload when you're ready to avoid overwriting your current edits.

reasons.Created: A floor was created from another session.
reasons.Deleted: A floor was deleted from another session.
reasons.DevicePlaced: A device was placed on the floor.
reasons.DeviceMoved: A device was moved on the floor.
reasons.LinkedRoomDeleted: A linked home room no longer exists.
reasons.DeviceDeleted: A linked device no longer exists.

confirmRemovePlacedFloorDevice: Remove this device from the floor?

errors.invalidWidth: Drawing width must be at least 480.
errors.invalidHeight: Drawing height must be at least 320.
errors.roomPolygonRequired: A room outline needs at least 3 points.
